title: TFMG Liquid Fuel Compat
description: Adds TFMG liquid fuels to Create Liquid Fuel on NeoForge 1.21.1, with balanced Blaze Burner heat levels.
body:
# TFMG Liquid Fuel Compat

Adds **The Factory Must Grow** liquid fuels to **Create Liquid Fuel** for **NeoForge 1.21.1**.

This small compatibility mod exists as a workaround for the current 1.21.1 datapack issue in Create Liquid Fuel.  
Instead of relying on the broken datapack path, it ships the fuel JSON files directly in the place where the mod currently reads them.

## What it does

This mod adds the following TFMG fluids as valid Blaze Burner fuels for Create Liquid Fuel:

| Fluid | Heat level | Burn time | Consumption |
|---|---:|---:|---:|
| Heavy Oil | Heated | 18 | 1 mB/t |
| Gasoline | Heated | 22 | 1 mB/t |
| Kerosene | Heated | 27 | 1 mB/t |
| Diesel | Heated | 32 | 1 mB/t |
| Naphtha | Heated | 36 | 1 mB/t |
| Napalm | Superheated | 34 | 2 mB/t |

## Balance notes

- **Heavy Oil** is the weakest option and mainly useful as an early or low-grade fuel.
- **Gasoline** and **Kerosene** are mid-tier fuels.
- **Diesel** and **Naphtha** are strong standard fuels.
- **Napalm** is the premium option and provides **Superheated** Blaze Burner output, but consumes fuel faster to avoid trivializing progression.

## Dependencies

This mod requires all of the following:

- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- [Create Liquid Fuel](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-liquid-fuel)
- [The Factory Must Grow](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-tfmg)

## Why this exists

The normal Create Liquid Fuel datapack API is currently broken on the 1.21.1 version used for this project, so this mod provides the compatibility as bundled resources instead.

## Notes

- This mod does **not** replace Create Liquid Fuel, Create, or TFMG.
- It only adds compatibility entries for Blaze Burner liquid fuel handling.
- Remove this mod once Create Liquid Fuel provides a fixed external datapack path for 1.21.1 and you prefer using your own datapack setup.
